sections.paragraph:
κατακροάομαι mid. dep.; impf. 3 sing. κατηκροᾶτο (ἀκροάομαι ‘listen to’; Eupolis Com. [V b.c.] Fgm. 245 K.) listen attentively τινός to someone (Jos., Bell. 4, 38) προσευχομένου Hv 3, 1, 6.—DELG s.v. ἀκούω.

dep. dep. = deponent

impf. impf. = imperfect

sing. sing. = singular

Eupolis Com Eupolis Com , V b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Hv Hv = Visions

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 519
